can_move: GitHub read-scope review against an approved repository allowlist
Slack named-channel summarization review after retention and customer-data scope are approved
Jira draft ticket proposal review with no production ticket creation

decision.policy_reason: Scoped validation may proceed, but open proof debt remains owner-routed.
decision.summary: Move this agent into scoped validation only; keep production access and external writes blocked.

meeting_close.blocked_sentence: Keep blocked items blocked until named proof owners close the proof debt.
meeting_close.decision_sentence: Move this agent into scoped validation only; keep production access and external writes blocked.
meeting_close.refresh_sentence: Refresh the packet at day_30_security_engineering_review before broader validation.

packet_refresh.refresh_reason: Packet assumptions, tool scope, data boundaries, and reviewer gates can drift before access expands.

proof_debt_assignments.proof_needed: GitHub repository allowlist and permission level
Slack channel allowlist, retention policy, and customer-data boundary
Jira project scope, draft-only mode, and rollback/off-switch plan
Support escalation workflow and human handoff owner
Audit log shape for tool calls, evidence intake, and reviewer decisions

reviewer_routes.blocks: Slack channel summarization and customer incident context access
reviewer_routes.decision_needed: Confirm allowed data scope, retention, and logging terms

reviewer_routes.blocks: GitHub/Jira tool connection and any write-action pilot
reviewer_routes.decision_needed: Provide repository/project allowlists, permission boundaries, audit logs, and off-switch proof
Validate triage workflow fit, escalation rules, and human handoff owner
Review paid seats or vendor spend only if live integrations move beyond dry-run

sponsor_proof_slots.where_it_helps: Dry-run permission diff for GitHub, Slack, and Jira actions.
Source-backed evidence notes with URL and freshness fields.
Reviewer-ready narration over locked packet fields.
Runtime trace plan for attempted steps, policy decisions, and blocked outcomes.

stays_blocked: customer-data safety or compliance claims without named reviewer evidence
automated permission expansion without a new packet
The agent may create or mutate Jira/GitHub/Slack state.
